name: Debbie's White Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a medium bowl; blend well.
2. Press the mixture onto the bottom and 2 inches up the sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 5 minutes. Cool on a wire rack.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine cream cheese and 1 cup sugar. Beat until fluffy.
5. Add sour cream and vanilla; mix well.
6. Stir in melted white chocolate.
7. Beat egg whites (at room temperature) in a large bowl until foamy. Add cream of tartar and beat until soft peaks form.
8. Fold the beaten egg whites into the cream cheese mixture.
9. Spoon the mixture over the crumb crust.
10. Bake at 325 degrees for 55 minutes. Turn off the oven.
11. Leave the cheesecake in the oven with the door partially open for an additional 30 minutes.
12. Cool, then chill for 8 hours. Remove from the pan. Yield: 10-12 servings.
